title: Canis Kevensis.
content:
I am his Highness�s dog at Kew.
	 Pray tell me, sir, whose dog are you?

	    Principis excelsi coram canis ecce Kevensis.
	    Dic mihi vicissim qu�so cujus canis es tu?
meaning:
"Canis Kevensis." is a quintessential example of Jacob Bigelow's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
